TAGNS-LZ-OKE-KEY.name: tagns-lz-oke
TAGNS-LZ-OKE-KEY.description: Landing Zone-owned tag that isolates OKE platforms.

TAG-LZ-OKE-PLATFORM-KEY.name: platform
TAG-LZ-OKE-PLATFORM-KEY.description: Identifies the owning OKE platform for principal-to-resource tag matching.

TAGNS-LZ-ROLE-KEY.name: tagns-lz-role
TAGNS-LZ-ROLE-KEY.description: Tag namespace for Tag Based Access Controls of Landing Zone Roles.

TAG-LZ-ROLE-KEY.name: tag-lz-role
TAG-LZ-ROLE-KEY.description: Tag used to identify different administrative roles within the Landing Zone, across network and security compartments
